subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast and endowed with understanding! The wise define human reason as the ability to discover the unknown, by means of a sequence of major and minor premises
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطقه ثابته حکماء گویند که نطق انسانی عبارت از ادراک حقائق مجهوله است به واسطه
subcodes.subjects: @mind as principle emanation; activity of the human spirit, @rational arguments, @the mind's power of discovery
